reviews.review_title: What a bunch of jumbled technical mess
reviews.review_description:
It's just thrown together with no thought or real programming skills at all other than hacking. The main thing people use this for is for installing APK Installer on the headset. Well you go to the main list of files and it shows you media and images and no drill down for actual getting to files. 
You have to jump through hoops to get it to show you the files list if they aren't in the above two categories.
Why is "APK Installer" so important? Because metaquest tries to keep you from installing your own apks kind of like you own the headset.....
Once that's installed then you can download an APK from APKpure or wherever and easily install it on your headset and very many of them actually work.

reviews.review_title: This is the third re-write of Mobile VR
reviews.review_description:
This is the third re-write of Mobile VR Station and was based upon the successful iOS/Android versions, but re-imagined to work only in VR.  The player has been built from the ground up to display 2D & 3D content on various projections such as Plane, Spherical, Dome, Full Dome, Curved and EAC.

The player will continue in its freemium tradition and allows you to try all features before buying.  The only limitation of the free version is it will only play the first five minutes of any video, but you are free to make sure it works with your content and has all the needed features at your leisure.  We offer support on our Facebook page if you have any questions and links are available inside the app to our various pages, online tutorials and the extensive help guide.
